description_long: This is a thick, rectangular hardcover book with a visually striking, gradient-colored cover that transitions from pink and orange to green and blue. The cover features a large, ornate white decorative flourish centered near the top, giving it an elegant and somewhat mystical appearance. The book's title is prominently displayed in bold, white uppercase letters, arranged in three lines. The edges of the cover are slightly glossy, reflecting light, and the book's pages are visible along the sides, appearing tightly bound and clean. The spine and back cover continue the same gradient color scheme, with no additional visible text or imagery. The overall design suggests a special or collectible edition, possibly for display or gifting.
description: A thick, hardcover book with a glossy, gradient-colored cover and ornate white decoration, featuring bold white title text. The book has a visually striking, elegant appearance and tightly bound pages.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, showing the gradient cover from pink to blue and the white decorative flourish and title text.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the front edge, displaying the closed pages and the colorful cover with the title and flourish clearly visible.
description_view_2: The book is shown from the opposite side, highlighting the full length of the cover, the title, and the decorative flourish.
description_view_3: The book is viewed from the back edge, showing the thickness of the pages and the continuation of the gradient cover design.
attribute_cover_illustration: The cover features a large, ornate white flourish or decorative motif, rendered in a swirling, elegant style. The background is a smooth gradient of pastel colors, blending from pink and orange to green and blue. No other imagery or illustration is visible.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is visible and continues the gradient color scheme of the cover, but no text or decorative elements are clearly visible on the spine. The design is simple and matches the front cover's palette.
